name: Consensus
description: AI academic search engine that synthesizes peer-reviewed research to surface the scientific consensus on questions.

seo.title: Consensus — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Consensus: AI academic search engine that synthesizes peer-reviewed research to surface the scientific consensus on questions.

when_to_use: Synthesize peer-reviewed evidence for health claims
Literature review acceleration for research teams
Evidence-based content generation grounded in science
Academic search API for AI writing assistant
Scientific consensus summarization for policy reports

pros: Surfaces peer-reviewed findings instead of random web content
Consensus meter summarizes agreement across studies quickly
Saves hours of manual literature triage for researchers
Cites sources directly so claims are verifiable
cons: Coverage skews to biomedical and social science fields
Free tier caps AI summaries and searches per month
Synthesis can oversimplify nuanced methodological disputes
Not a substitute for a proper systematic review workflow
review.verdict: Great first-pass research tool for evidence-backed answers, but verify synthesis against full papers for any serious use.
review.best_for: Researchers, journalists, and clinicians doing fast evidence lookup on specific questions.
review.not_for: Rigorous systematic reviews or fields with thin peer-reviewed corpora.
